title: Catified Potions
description: Minecraft potions but cat, includes modified potion particles!
body:
![A banner showcasing several potion textures, with "Catified Potions" text above it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8UQvSK3R/images/0265dec0b34a3d3fc33a7a75e3fe5ca50fca276a.png)

## Potions but Catified
Included Textures:
- Honey Bottle
- Dragon's Breath
- Bottle o Enchanting
- Glass Bottle
- All Potions
- Modified Particles
